action.content:
Write a funny note to McQueen, using
to separate lines. Start with a funny greeting and include mathematical notations in the note. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S
action.label: context

action.content:
Dear McQueen,

Greetings, my favorite racer! 🏎️🏁

I was just sitting in the garage, staring at the speedometer, and I realized something hilarious: **v** is the only number that can actually catch up to **u** (you) without breaking the laws of physics.

Remember that famous race where you tried to overtake a slow car? You calculated your speed as **v** = 100 km/h, but the car ahead was moving at **u** = 50 km/h. You thought, "Easy! I'll just add **v** to **u** to get **2u**!" But then you forgot that **2u** is just **100 km/h**, which is exactly what you were already doing.

So, here is the math lesson for you:
$$ \text{Speed} = \frac{\text{Distance}}{\text{Time}} $$
$$ \text{You} = \frac{\text{Distance}}{\text{Time}} $$
$$ \text{You} = \text{You} $$

Don't worry about the other cars; they are just **u**s waiting for their turn. You are the only one who knows how to drive a car that actually moves forward. Keep pushing, McQueen! The world is waiting for your **v** to reach **infinity**! 🌍🚀

P.P.S. I found a new tire shop near the track; if you need one, just ask for the "McQueen Special" and they will give you a discount on the **u** (yourself).
action.label: response
